message:
fix(dashboard): increase tmux operation timeouts to prevent deadline exceeded errors

The dashboard was using overly aggressive timeouts for tmux operations,
causing "context deadline exceeded" errors on slower VPS systems or when
tmux has many panes.

Changes:
- Session data fetch timeout: 2s → 8s (includes list-panes + capture-pane)
- Status detection timeout: 3s → 6s (includes DetectAllContext)
- Improved error message to suggest running NTM outside of tmux

The previous 2-second timeout was insufficient because session fetch
involves multiple tmux commands:
1. tmux list-panes with activity timestamps
2. tmux capture-pane for each pane's output

On fresh VPS installs or systems with many panes, this could easily
exceed 2 seconds, causing the dashboard to show "tmux is responding
slowly" even when tmux was working fine.

Fixes Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup#20
